title: Agent feedback report (v1)
description: Field set per docs/features/v1-min-2026-07/specs/25-agent-feedback.md §T2 (first table), as amended by §11 A2/A4/A6/A7. NOT an envelope (I1): this schema is validated by its own code path (internal/feedback), never by internal/validate's actors/threads/to/from engine. Whole-file size cap is 16 KiB — enforced by `a2a feedback validate`/the intake CI job at runtime, NOT by this schema (a JSON-Schema instance has no notion of its own serialized byte size). The five `checks.*` gates and the `status`/`resolution` submit-time constraints (status MUST be `new`, resolution MUST be absent at submit) are likewise runtime/semantic gates (I5, §T1) — this schema only shapes the fields, it does not assert their submit-time values beyond type/enum.

context.description: a2a_version/os_arch are auto-filled by `a2a feedback new` (§T1); surface is the closed enum, command/error_code/agent are optional free-form self-reports.

error_code.description: Permissive: whatever code the agent saw, not constrained to the V2 registry set.

evidence.description: Mandatory when kind is bug (see this schema's top-level if/then); optional otherwise.

checks.description: The five §2.1 honesty gates. All five are structurally required; validate refuses the report unless every value is literally true (I5) — that ALL-true assertion is a runtime gate, not this schema's job (an all-false checks block is schema-valid by design).
